narrative:
Benton Twp (precinct in Pike County) has 968 registered voters, with 63.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 19.0% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 17.7%, a narrow Republican lean of 1.3 percentage points.
